query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN themes IS NULL OR themes = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_themes, SUM(CASE WHEN color NOT IN ('white', 'black') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as invalid_color FROM puzzles;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN themes IS NULL OR themes = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_themes, SUM(CASE WHEN color NOT IN ('white', 'black') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as invalid_color FROM puzzles;
